items.source_name: 生活協同組合コープさっぽろ
items.summary_en: A farm in Makkari Village, Hokkaido turns into a restaurant for one day. Visitors can eat fresh vegetables right in the field. The event is part of the COOP Sapporo cooperative's local activities.
items.summary_ko: 홋카이도 마카리촌의 한 농장이 하루 동안 레스토랑으로 변신합니다. 방문객들은 밭에서 바로 신선한 채소를 맛볼 수 있습니다. 이 행사는 코프 삿포로 생활협동조합의 지역 활동의 일환입니다.
items.title_en: September 6: Goto Farm in Makkari Village opens as a restaurant in the fields
items.title_ko: 9월 6일, 마카리촌 고토 농장이 밭에서 레스토랑을 엽니다
items.title_original: 9月6日 真狩村 ごとう農園｜畑でレストラン2026｜イベント・活動｜生活協同組合コープさっぽろ - 生活協同組合コープさっぽろ

items.raw_excerpt: The Swedish heatwave may be a far cry from the deadly temperatures sweeping parts of Europe, but several Swedish cities saw the mercury climb to unprecedented levels over the weekend.
items.summary_en: Several Swedish cities recorded their hottest days ever over the weekend. Malmö saw temperatures rise to unprecedented levels during the heatwave.
items.summary_ko: 스웨덴 여러 도시가 주말 동안 사상 최고 기온을 기록했다. 말뫼를 비롯한 도시들이 기록적인 폭염을 겪으며 수은주가 전례 없는 수준까지 치솟았다.
items.title_en: Malmö has hottest day ever as Swedish cities break heatwave records
items.title_ko: 말뫼, 사상 최고 기온 경신…스웨덴 여러 도시 폭염 신기록
items.title_original: Malmö registers hottest day ever as several Swedish cities set new heatwave records

items.raw_excerpt: At midnight on Monday the physical Rejsekort travel card will officially be retired, with travellers instead having to use the Rejsekort app or the new physical Basiskort travel card.
items.summary_en: Denmark is retiring the physical Rejsekort travel card at midnight on Monday. Travelers must now use the Rejsekort app or the new physical Basiskort card instead.
items.summary_ko: 덴마크가 월요일 자정을 기해 실물 Rejsekort 교통카드를 공식 폐지한다. 앞으로 여행객은 Rejsekort 앱 또는 새로 도입된 실물 Basiskort 카드를 사용해야 한다.
items.title_en: Denmark stops using physical Rejsekort travel card
items.title_ko: 덴마크, 실물 Rejsekort 교통카드 사용 종료
items.title_original: Denmark phases out physical Rejsekort travel card

items.raw_excerpt: We’ll gladly explain the meaning of this polite Norwegian word which can be used many times a day.
items.summary_en: Gjerne is a polite Norwegian word used many times a day. This article explains its meaning and how to use it.
items.summary_ko: Gjerne은 노르웨이에서 하루에도 여러 번 쓰이는 공손한 표현이다. 이 기사는 이 단어의 의미와 사용법을 설명한다.
items.title_en: Norwegian word of the day: Gjerne
items.title_ko: 오늘의 노르웨이 단어: Gjerne
items.title_original: Norwegian word of the day: Gjerne

items.raw_excerpt: Though all of Swiss regions have sweltered under the extremely hot weather for nearly three weeks this month, Basel bore the brunt of the heatwave.
items.summary_en: Basel recorded the highest temperatures during Switzerland's three-week heatwave. The city reached 39°C while all regions suffered extreme heat.
items.summary_ko: 스위스 전역이 거의 3주째 극심한 폭염에 시달리는 가운데, 바젤이 가장 높은 기온을 기록했습니다. 이 도시는 39°C까지 치솟으며 다른 지역보다 더위를 심하게 견뎌냈습니다.
items.title_en: 39°C: Why Basel suffered most in Swiss heatwave
items.title_ko: 39°C: 스위스 폭염 중 바젤이 가장 뜨거웠던 이유
items.title_original: 39C: Why was Basel hit by highest temperatures during Swiss heatwave?

items.raw_excerpt: Police are trying to trace a member of the Dutch short track skating team who has not been seen since Saturday evening. Sven Roes, 26, was last seen at a petrol station in Muiden at 4.15pm, filling up a Mitsubishi ASX with a TeamNL sticker. His last phone contact was just after 7pm. Police would not say if Roes was being treated as a missing person, but other members of the Dutch Olympic skating team shared a post on Instagram...
items.summary_en: Dutch police are searching for Olympic short track skater Sven Roes, 26, who went missing on Saturday. He was last seen at a petrol station in Muiden filling up his car with a TeamNL sticker. His phone has been off since 7pm that evening.
items.summary_ko: 네덜란드 올림픽 쇼트트랙 국가대표 스벤 뢰스(26)가 토요일 저녁 이후 연락이 끊겼다. 그는 뮈던의 한 주유소에서 TeamNL 스티커가 붙은 차량에 주유하는 모습이 마지막 목격이었다. 경찰은 실종자 처리 여부를 밝히지 않았지만, 올림픽 대표팀 동료들이 SNS에 게시글을 공유하며 걱정을 드러냈다.
items.title_en: Concern growing for missing Dutch Olympic short track skater
items.title_ko: 네덜란드 올림픽 쇼트트랙 선수 실종…경찰 수색 중
items.title_original: Concern growing for missing Dutch Olympic short track skater

items.raw_excerpt: The ICAC inquiry has heard a former University of Wollongong executive was dismissed on the day of a disputed salary increase.
items.summary_en: A former University of Wollongong executive was fired on the same day he rejected a colleague's salary increase. The Independent Commission Against Corruption is investigating the dismissal.
items.summary_ko: 울런공대 전직 임원이 동료의 급여 인상을 거부한 당일에 해고된 것으로 ICAC 청문회에서 밝혀졌다. 독립반부패위원회가 이 해고 건을 조사 중이다.
items.title_en: University executive fired same day he blocked colleague's pay raise, corruption inquiry hears
items.title_ko: 대학 임원, 동료 승진 거부한 날 해고돼…ICAC 청문회 증언
items.title_original: ICAC hears uni executive sacked the day he rejected colleague's pay rise

items.raw_excerpt: The judge rejected Toh Sze Ee's claim that he had fallen asleep at the wheel seconds before the collision.
items.summary_en: A van driver was found guilty of a reduced charge after running over a cyclist. The judge did not believe his claim that he fell asleep just before the crash. The accident happened in Singapore.
items.summary_ko: 자전거를 치어 숨지게 한 승합차 운전사가 감경된 혐의로 유죄 판결을 받았다. 재판부는 사고 직전 운전자가 운전 중 잠들었다는 주장을 받아들이지 않았다. 사고는 싱가포르에서 발생했다.
items.title_en: Van driver who killed cyclist convicted of lesser charge
items.title_ko: 자전거 타던 사람 치어 숨지게 한 승합차 운전사, 감경된 혐의로 유죄 판결
items.title_original: Van driver who ran over cyclist in fatal case convicted of downgraded charge

items.raw_excerpt: Micael Stohm, who normally works as a breakdown recovery driver, has gone viral in Sweden after building his own island – in the shape of a penis.
items.summary_en: Micael Stohm, a breakdown recovery driver, built his own island in the shape of a penis. His unusual project has gone viral across Sweden.
items.summary_ko: 견인차 기사로 일하는 미카엘 스톰이 직접 자신만의 섬을 만들었다. 그런데 섬의 모양이 남성 성기를 닮아 큰 화제를 모으고 있다. 이 독특한 프로젝트는 스웨덴 전역에서 입소문을 타고 있다.
items.title_en: Swedish man builds penis-shaped island, goes viral
items.title_ko: 스웨덴 남성, '남근 모양 섬' 직접 만들어 화제
items.title_original: Swedish man goes viral after building own island in the shape of a penis

items.raw_excerpt: A local train derailed at Kyoto Station on Monday morning but none of the roughly 30 passengers aboard were injured, the train operator said. The four-car train bound for Kashiharajingu-mae on the Kintetsu Kyoto Line derailed at around 5:15 a.m., after traveling about 120 meters from Kyoto Station, according to…
items.summary_en: A local train on the Kintetsu Kyoto Line derailed at Kyoto Station around 5:15 a.m. None of the roughly 30 passengers aboard were hurt. The four-car train had traveled about 120 meters from the station before the derailment.
items.summary_ko: 월요일 새벽 5시 15분쯤 긴테츠 교토선 구간을 달리던 지역 열차가 교토역을 출발한 지 약 120미터 지점에서 탈선했다. 승객 약 30명 중 다친 사람은 없었다.
items.title_en: Local train derails at Kyoto Station; no injuries
items.title_ko: 교토역에서 지역 열차 탈선, 부상자 없어
items.title_original: Local train derails at Kyoto Station; no injuries

items.raw_excerpt: Thieves have allegedly made away from a WA mining town with 8 tonnes of tugboat propellers, with the copper estimated to be worth an eye-watering $2 million.
items.summary_en: Thieves stole 8 tonnes of bronze tugboat propellers from a mining town in Western Australia. The copper inside the propellers is worth about $2 million. Police are searching for clues in the unusual heist.
items.summary_ko: 서호주 광산 마을에서 괴한들이 8톤 분량의 청동 예인선 프로펠러를 통째로 훔쳐갔다. 프로펠러 속 구리 가치는 약 2백만 달러로 추정된다. 경찰은 이 이례적인 절도 사건의 단서를 찾고 있다.
items.title_en: Bronze tugboat propellers worth $2m stolen in WA's north
items.title_ko: 서호주 북부 광산마을, 8톤짜리 예인선 프로펠러 2백만 달러어치 도난
items.title_original: Bronze tugboat propellers worth $2m stolen in WA's north

items.raw_excerpt: A man and a woman died after being found collapsed and bleeding in a room at an adult entertainment venue in Kobe on Sunday night. According to police, an employee at the venue in Hyogo Ward called emergency services around 10 p.m., and said that a male customer and a…
items.summary_en: A man and a woman were found bleeding at an adult entertainment venue in Kobe on Sunday night. They later died. Police are investigating the case.
items.summary_ko: 일요일 밤 고베의 한 성인 오락시설에서 남녀가 피를 흘린 채 발견돼 숨졌다. 경찰이 수사에 나섰다.
items.title_en: Man and woman found stabbed at Kobe adult entertainment venue, die
items.title_ko: 고베 성인 오락시설서 남녀 흉기에 찔려 숨져
items.title_original: Man, woman die after being found stabbed at Kobe sex establishment

items.raw_excerpt: Two regions in South Australia and one in New South Wales were set to lose access to free-to-air Network 10 services in coming days, but a new agreement means coverage will continue until the end of September.
items.summary_en: Two regions in South Australia and one in New South Wales almost lost free-to-air Network 10 TV service. A last-minute deal keeps the channel available until the end of September. Viewers in Riverland, Mount Gambier, and Griffith benefit from the agreement.
items.summary_ko: 사우스오스트레일리아와 뉴사우스웨일스 일부 지역에서 무료 채널 10 방송이 중단될 뻔했으나, 극적 합의로 9월 말까지 방송이 연장됐다. 리버랜드, 마운트감비어, 그리피스 지역 시청자들이 계속 시청할 수 있게 됐다.
items.title_en: Network 10 extends regional TV broadcasting in SA and NSW through September
items.title_ko: 네트워크 10, SA·NSW 지역 방송 중단 위기 막판 합의
items.title_original: Network 10 strikes last-minute deal to extend broadcasting in SA and NSW

items.raw_excerpt: The facility next to Sengkang West Bus Depot houses close to 200 drivers from China.
items.summary_en: A new residence for bus drivers has opened next to Sengkang West Bus Depot in Singapore. It houses nearly 200 drivers from China and includes air conditioning and a games room.
items.summary_ko: 싱가포르 센강웨스트 버스 차고지 옆에 버스기사 전용 기숙사가 문을 열었다. 에어컨과 게임룸을 갖췄으며 중국 출신 기사 약 200명이 생활한다.
items.title_en: Singapore opens first bus driver dormitory with aircon and games room
items.title_ko: 싱가포르, 에어컨·게임룸 갖춘 첫 버스기사 전용 숙소 개소
items.title_original: Singapore's first dedicated bus driver residence opens with aircon, games room and a depot next door

items.raw_excerpt: L’abbaye Saint-Philibert de Tournus en Bourgogne est un joyau millénaire de notre patrimoine aux portes de Lyon.
items.summary_en: Just an hour from Lyon, the town of Tournus is home to the Saint-Philibert Abbey, a thousand-year-old gem. It was among the very first buildings in France to be listed as a historical monument in 1840.
items.summary_ko: 리옹에서 불과 1시간 거리에 있는 투르뉴 마을에는 천년 역사의 생필리베르 수도원이 자리하고 있다. 이 수도원은 1840년 프랑스에서 처음으로 역사적 기념물로 지정된 건축물 중 하나다.
items.title_en: A small town near Lyon hides one of France's most beautiful abbeys
items.title_ko: 리옹에서 1시간, 작은 마을에 숨겨진 프랑스 최고의 아름다운 수도원
items.title_original: À 1h de Lyon, cette petite ville cache l’une des plus belles abbayes de France - elle fut d’ailleurs dans la liste des premiers édifices en France à être classés monument historique dès 1840 - Lyon Secret

items.raw_excerpt: Supermarkets have criticised the Dutch government’s plans to include milk and juice cartons in the deposit return scheme for glass and plastic bottles. Green growth minister Stientje van Veldhoven announced the measure in a letter to parliament last week, arguing it would reduce litter and make the system easier for consumers to understand. “At the moment deposits are mandatory for plastic soft drink and water bottles but not for other plastic bottles,” she wrote. “Consumers sometimes don’t unde
items.summary_en: Supermarkets are against the Dutch government's plan to add milk and juice cartons to the bottle deposit system. The government says this will reduce litter and make rules simpler for shoppers.
items.summary_ko: 네덜란드 정부가 플라스틱 병에만 적용되던 보증금 제도를 우유팩·주스팩으로 확대하자 유통업계가 강하게 반발하고 있다. 정부는 쓰레기 감소와 소비자 편의를 위한 조치라고 설명했다.
items.title_en: Retailers criticize plan for deposits on milk and juice packs
items.title_ko: 네덜란드, 우유팩·주스팩에도 보증금 제도 확대…유통업계 반발
items.title_original: Retailers criticise plan for deposits on milk and juice packs

items.raw_excerpt: An Alice Springs parole worker found in a hotel room with the 20-year-old she was responsible for supporting has avoided prison for attempting to pervert the course of justice.
items.summary_en: A parole worker in Alice Springs was found in a hotel room with the 20-year-old offender she was supervising. The court said her behavior was 'grossly inappropriate' but spared her prison time for attempting to pervert the course of justice.
items.summary_ko: 앨리스스프링스에서 한 보호관찰관이 자신이 담당하던 20세 보호대상자와 호텔 방에 함께 있다가 적발됐다. 법원은 그녀의 행동을 '극도로 부적절하다'고 판단했지만 사법 방해 혐의에 대해 징역형은 면제했다.
items.title_en: Parole worker who had relationship with offender avoids prison
items.title_ko: 보호대상자와 부적절한 관계 맺은 보호관찰관, 징역 면해
items.title_original: Court finds staffer's relationship with 20yo parolee 'grossly inappropriate'

items.raw_excerpt: In a TikTok video, French politician Geoffroy Boulard said he had air-conditioners, produced by Chinese manufacturer Haier, delivered to several schools in his district in Paris.
items.summary_en: A French politician in Paris had air-conditioners delivered to several schools in his district. The units were made by Chinese manufacturer Haier. Europe is facing a record heatwave and demand for cooling is surging.
items.summary_ko: 파리의 한 프랑스 정치인이 자신의 지역구에 있는 여러 학교에 에어컨을 설치했습니다. 이 제품은 중국 하이어가 제조했습니다. 유럽은 기록적인 폭염에 시달리며 냉방 수요가 급증하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: French politician sends air-conditioners to Paris schools during heatwave
items.title_ko: 파리 학교에 에어컨을 보낸 프랑스 정치인
items.title_original: Surging demand for Chinese air-conditioners amid record heatwave in Europe

items.raw_excerpt: El municipio, habitual en las mascletàs y los castillos de las Hogueras, dará ahora el salto al popular programa de verano de La 1
items.summary_en: A small town famous for its mascleta fireworks and Hogueras castles will be the only town from the Valencian Community on the Grand Prix 2026 TV competition. The popular summer show on La 1 picks one town per region to compete in games.
items.summary_ko: 마스클레타 불꽃놀이와 오게라스 성 축제로 유명한 작은 마을이 발렌시아 공동체를 대표해 그랑프리 2026 TV 경쟁 프로그램에 유일하게 선발됐다. La 1의 인기 여름 프로그램은 지역당 한 마을을 뽑아 게임 대결을 펼친다.
items.title_en: Small fireworks town chosen as only Valencian contestant in Grand Prix 2026 TV show
items.title_ko: 작은 불꽃 마을, 발렌시아 공동체 유일하게 그랑프리 2026 출전
items.title_original: El pueblo de la pólvora, único representante de la Comunitat Valenciana en el Grand Prix 2026 - Alacant Extra

items.raw_excerpt: It won't take forever to learn this Italian word.
items.summary_en: Lungaggine is an Italian word for something that takes a very long time. It describes a slow, boring process. The good news is the word itself is easy to learn.
items.summary_ko: Lungaggine는 몹시 오래 걸리는 일을 가리키는 이탈리아어 단어입니다. 지루하고 더딘 과정을 뜻하지만, 단어 자체는 쉽게 외울 수 있습니다.
items.title_en: Italian word of the day: 'Lungaggine'
items.title_ko: 오늘의 이탈리아어 단어: 'Lungaggine'
items.title_original: Italian word of the day: 'Lungaggine'
